title: Luck Potion
description: Makes the luck potion obtainable in survival.
body:
A very lightweight mod that allows the luck potion and its variants to be brewed in survival.
## Brewing
The luck potion can be brewed in a brewing stand like any other potion. To make it, start by brewing an awkward potion with nether wart. Then, use a lily pad to turn the awkward potions into luck potions.
## Variations
  The variants of the luck potion follow the vanilla recipes for other potion variants. Splash potions, lingering potions, and tipped arrows are all available, however increasing the potency or duration is not.
